title: Metals gains following sanctions on Russian supply
section_path: Metals gains following sanctions on Russian supply
section_path_text: Metals gains following sanctions on Russian supply
summary:
Main
Supply disruption across the metals sector continues to provide support. Oil markets were on edge as it waits for Israels response to Iran's recent attack. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-04-19 101419.png | assets/2024-04-19_metals-gains-following-sanctions-on-russian-supply_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_07eecbc891f3.png
The rally across the base metals continued amid fears of tightening supplies.
